message:
fix(codegen): Flush builder before checking for empty block stubs

The issue was that module functions emit to builder, not self.output directly.
When expr_stmt checked expr_output, it was empty because content was in builder.

Fix: Flush builder to output before checking for empty block expressions.
This allows detection of {} stubs from module functions like codecs.register_error.

Before: {} in builder, check misses it, semicolon added -> {} ;
After: {} flushed to output, detected and skipped entirely
